description:
POP API for European electronic invoicing workflows.

This Printing Press blueprint intentionally exposes only the documented
8-operation surface used by the POP MCP README at
getpopapi/pop-mcp@07a4a19ad5e657fa94d16fe617b8288e5046c489:

  - create-xml
  - create-ubl
  - create-pdf
  - sdi-via-pop/document-notifications
  - peppol/document-get
  - sdi-via-pop/document-get
  - sdi-via-pop/document-verify
  - sdi-via-pop/document-preserve

The `data` payloads are intentionally modeled as free-form JSON objects so
the CLI can pass through the full POP invoice structure without freezing a
brittle nested schema in this catalog spec.

Upstream POP MCP changes should be reviewed periodically and intentionally
synced into this print when the documented public surface evolves.

tools.name: create-pdf_invoice
tools.description: Generate a branded PDF invoice. Depending on account setup and payload, POP may return a direct file, a URL, or a JSON response. Required: data. Optional: integration, plugin_version, send_email (default: false) (plus 2 more). Returns the new DocumentResponse.

params.name: send_email
params.description: Send the generated PDF using the email settings inside `data`.

tools.name: create-ubl_invoice
tools.description: Generate a PEPPOL BIS / UBL invoice and optionally submit it through POP's PEPPOL integration. Required: data. Optional: integration, plugin_version, site_title (plus 2 more). Returns the new DocumentResponse.

params.name: submit_to_peppol
params.description: Submit to the PEPPOL network after generating UBL.

tools.name: create-xml_invoice
tools.description: Generate an Italian FatturaPA XML document and optionally submit it to SdI. The `data` object must follow POP's invoice structure. Required: data. Optional: integration, plugin_version, site_title (plus 2 more). Returns the new DocumentResponse.

params.name: submit_to_sdi
params.description: Submit to the Italian SdI after generating XML.

tools.name: peppol_get-document
tools.description: Retrieve a PEPPOL document from POP by UUID and optional zone. Required: integration. Returns the new GenericResponse.

tools.name: sdi-via-pop_get-invoice-status
tools.description: Read POP's recorded SdI notifications for a submitted invoice UUID. Required: integration. Returns array of SdiViaPopGetInvoiceStatusItem.

tools.name: sdi-via-pop_get-sdi-document
tools.description: Retrieve a stored SdI document by UUID. Required: integration. Returns the new GenericResponse.

tools.name: sdi-via-pop_preserve-sdi-document
tools.description: Archive an accepted SdI document in POP's long-term storage. Required: integration. Returns the new GenericResponse.

tools.name: sdi-via-pop_verify-sdi-document
tools.description: Validate a Base64-encoded SdI XML document before submission. Required: integration. Optional: skip_business_check (default: true). Returns the new GenericResponse.
